summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MJV Labs redesigned landing page. All new features working perfectly including FairFare case study, interactive expandable service panels, project calculator with dynamic pricing, and Netlify Forms contact form. Mobile responsiveness and navigation functionality confirmed.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with FairFare app mockup UI (not stock image) - displays ride comparison interface with Uber X, Lyft options
FairFare case study section displays with phone mockup and 'Live Product' badge - fully functional
Services section has 3 expandable panels that expand on click showing gradient background - Website (blue), Apps (teal), Products (purple)
Project Calculator shows estimate dynamically when options are selected - tested Website ($750-$2500), App ($2500-$8000), Advanced complexity updates
Calculator estimate updates based on project type, complexity, design level, and features - all selections working
Contact form has Netlify form attributes (data-netlify='true', form-name hidden field) - properly configured
Contact form has all required fields: name, email, company, project-type, timeline, budget, message - all present and functional
Process section shows 'Working version in days, not months' - correct text displayed
Navigation links work (Work, Services, Estimate, Contact) - all scroll to correct sections
Mobile responsive design - mobile menu toggle works, navigation links display correctly
Service panel expansions show gradient backgrounds and expanded content (Get Started buttons)
Calculator feature selection works (Contact Form, User Login, etc.)
Contact form fields can be filled and dropdowns work properly
Navigation smooth scrolling to sections works correctly
All CTA buttons are clickable and properly positioned
Mobile menu displays navigation links when opened
